description:
Daily 8 AM PHT cron — Track 1 janitor for Stage 1 / Stage 2 applicants.

Responsibilities:
1. Drain the queued-refusal queue (applicants flagged off-hours by the
   info survey adjudication SA): send the queued template and archive.
2. Send cascading reminders to Stage-1/2 applicants who haven't
   completed Survey 1:
     - first miss → General Follow-up Reminder + stamp
       x_studio_reminder_date
     - second miss → Final Reminder Before Archive + stamp
       x_studio_final_reminder_date
     - third miss → archive with "Refuse did not complete assessment"

Ships three templates and the cron. The four reminder-date fields
(x_studio_reminder_date, x_studio_final_reminder_date,
x_studio_sms_reminder_date, x_studio_sms_new_reminder_date) already
exist on every target env. x_studio_resume_request_date and
x_studio_queued_refusal_id also already exist.

model_id=662 = hr.applicant ir.model (verified across envs).
